message:
feat(api): add global error handler to Hono app

Add app.onError() handler that catches any uncaught exceptions and
returns a standardized error response with:
- Error object envelope format
- INTERNAL_ERROR code
- Correlation ID for request tracing
- Structured logging with path, method, and error details

This ensures all unhandled errors return consistent API responses
instead of default 500 responses.
